message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to sqlite storage and e2e tests

Reformats query_row closure in SqliteStorage::update_issue for consistent
line wrapping, normalizes assert! macro argument formatting in claim
atomicity tests, and adds missing space after commas in completions test
function calls. No behavioral changes.

Files touched:
- src/storage/sqlite.rs: query_row closure line-wrap normalization
- tests/e2e_claim_atomic.rs: assert! macro multi-line formatting
- tests/e2e_completions.rs: comma spacing in assert_contains_dynamic_markers calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
